label: 1973bb–2 to 1973bb–4 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 94–73, title IV, § 40789 Stat. 405Aug. 6, 1975
notes: Section 1973bb–2, , as added , , , authorized the Attorney General to institute actions to enforce this subchapter, and provided for jurisdiction of district courts, appeals, and penalties for denial of rights secured by this subchapter. See , Voting and Elections.Pub. L. 89–110, title III, § 303Pub. L. 91–285, § 684 Stat. 318section 10701 of Title 52June 22, 1970
Section 1973bb–3, , as added , , , defined “State”. See , Voting and Elections.Pub. L. 89–110, title III, § 304Pub. L. 91–285, § 684 Stat. 319section 10702 of Title 52June 22, 1970
Section 1973bb–4, , as added , , , provided for effective date of this subchapter.Pub. L. 89–10, title III, § 305Pub. L. 91–285, § 684 Stat. 319June 22, 1970
